name: Hamburgers in the Freezer
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the ground beef into four 4 oz (quarter-pound) patties.
2. Place the patties and 4 hamburger buns in separate compartments of a 1-quart and gallon-size freezer bags, respectively.
3. To prepare: do not thaw the patties before cooking.
4. Cook the frozen patties in a skillet or pan-broil them, OR broil over a barbecue grill.
Serving Ideas:
Potato or Macaroni Salad, Potato Chips, and Dill Pickles
